name: ✨ Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for HashPilot
title: "[FEAT] "
labels: ["enhancement"]

---

## ✨ Feature Summary

A short, clear description of what you'd like to see added.

## Problem / Motivation

Is your feature request related to a problem? Describe it.
*e.g. "I'm always frustrated when I can't compare results across machines..."*

## Proposed Solution

Describe the solution you'd like. Be as specific as possible.

## Alternatives Considered

Have you considered any alternative approaches or workarounds? If so, describe them here.

## Additional Context

- Add any mockups, screenshots, or references that might help illustrate the idea.
- Is this on the [ROADMAP](https://github.com/RaghavendraPedada-1765/HashPilot/blob/main/ROADMAP.md)? If so, does this expand on it?

## Would you like to work on this?

- [ ] Yes, I'd like to submit a PR for this feature
- [ ] No, but I'd love to see it implemented
